name: Jonathan Kelly
exact_department: University of Toronto Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS)
sub_directions: Robust State Estimation (including certifiably optimal solvers)
Autonomous Navigation in Unstructured Outdoor Environments
Radar and Lidar Localization for Self-Driving Vehicles
tech_stack: Advanced State Estimation Algorithms (e.g., optimization-based methods)
Machine Learning for Perception and Terrain Assessment
recent_papers: Certifiably Optimal Solvers for Robotics State Estimation
interest_paragraph: I am particularly drawn to Professor Kelly's work in robust state estimation, especially the application of certifiably optimal solvers and kernelized state estimation for mobile robots operating in unstructured outdoor environments. My background in robotics and AI agent development aligns well with the lab's focus on vision-based navigation and the use of Lidar/Radar for self-driving, and I am eager to contribute to projects like multi-robot teach and repeat navigation within the Toronto region.
